Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class IdeasSettings

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.MetadataForSettings
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.IdeasSettings
public class IdeasSettings extends MetadataForSettings

Java class for IdeasSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="IdeasSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}MetadataForSettings">
       <sequence>
         <element name="enableChatterProfile" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableHtmlIdea" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableIdeaMultipleCategory" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableIdeaThemes" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableIdeas" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableIdeasControllerExtensions" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableIdeasReputation" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="halfLife" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ideasProfilePage" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
